sector_summary: The Materials sector (XLB) stands out with high confidence and strong performance. Financials (XLF) and Energy (XLE) show medium confidence but are underperforming relative to the S&P 500. Healthcare (XLV) has conflicting signals between price and news, which diminishes its attractiveness. Sectors like Consumer Staples (XLP), Industrials (XLI), and Utilities (XLU) are weak and should be avoided.
